items.title: Winning Health & CLIC (中国人寿) Deepened collaboration on Commercial Insurance + Medical digital closed-loop.
items.raw_desc: Deepened collaboration on 'Commercial Insurance + Medical' digital closed-loop. Joint appearance at HIMSS 2026 (Mar 9-12) in Las Vegas. Focus on real-time insurance settlement, evidence-based auditing (Evidence-Mesh), and aging-friendly digital medical services.

items.title: WiNEX & WiNGPT: Transition to AI-Native architecture and Launch of WiNBOT distributed AI workstations.
items.raw_desc: WiNEX transitioned to 'AI-Native' architecture. WiNGPT iterated to v3.5-turbo (MoE architecture). Launch of WiNBOT distributed AI workstations. WiNEX Copilot deployed in nearly 150 medical institutions. Showcased at HIMSS 2026.

items.title: Winning Health 2026 Restrictive Stock Incentive Plan: Verification and Self-Audit Report.
items.raw_desc: 2026 Restrictive Stock Incentive Plan: 703 participants (including CEO Wang Tao), 100 million shares at 5.32 RMB/share. Supervisory board verification completed on Mar 10. Self-audit report on insider trading released Mar 12. EGM scheduled for Mar 16.
